body:
## Purpose 
In a simplified scenario (K_soil = 0), an analytic solution exists for the phase change problem. This implements that as a tutorial and compares our simulation to the analytic expectation.


## To-do

## Content
Adds a tutorial

title: Adds an analytic test of the soil phase change parameterization
